name: Glass
description: A pane of glass over the scene behind the window. The backdrop is blurred and bends toward the edges like a bevelled lens, with slight colour fringing and a soft rim light. It shows through wherever the window itself is translucent, so pair it with an opacity rule.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Blur radius
parameters.description: How strongly the scene behind the glass is blurred (px)

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Corner rounding of the glass pane (px, match the Border pack)

parameters.name: Refraction strength
parameters.description: How far the backdrop bends at the pane's bevelled edge

parameters.name: Bevel width
parameters.description: How far the lens bevel reaches in from the edge (px)

parameters.name: Colour fringing
parameters.description: Chromatic split between the red and blue refraction

parameters.name: Rim light
parameters.description: Strength of the rim light along the pane's edge

parameters.name: Tint strength
parameters.description: How much of the tint colour is mixed over the glass

parameters.name: Physically based refraction
parameters.description: Bend the backdrop with Snell's law instead of the simple offset

parameters.name: Bevel intensity
parameters.description: How steeply the physically based bevel tilts the glass surface

parameters.name: Corner lens
parameters.description: Extra outward lens pull toward the corners in the physically based mode

parameters.name: Edge lighting
parameters.description: Add the backdrop's own light back along the bevel

parameters.name: Saturation
parameters.description: Saturation of the glass in the OKLab colour space, where 1.0 leaves it unchanged

parameters.name: Noise
parameters.description: Fine grain that masks banding in the blurred glass
